signals.npcLine: Crypto tides are red; the market bleeds faint hope.
signals.questPulse: Salvage value dips, shadows spread in trade lanes.
signals.worldFeed: Digital credits flicker; mass panic brews in the neon grid.

signals.npcLine: Nodes report trending tokens losing grip in the flux.
signals.questPulse: Hackers sniff weak spots near glitching assets.
signals.worldFeed: Data streams pick up whispers of unstable coins.
signals.clueEvent: Sudden trade volume drops on obscure digital creds.

signals.npcLine: Monitor those ape codes — signals fade into static.
signals.questPulse: Silent shifts in token patterns hint at deeper unrest.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto symbols flicker, cloaked in uncertainty.
signals.clueEvent: Anomalies detected around tokens tagged 'APE' and 'MON'.

signals.npcLine: Seek the glitch in the market’s spine; fortune or fall awaits.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate circuits where falling caps disrupt the norm.
signals.worldFeed: Survivors barter secrets on crumbling digital exchanges.
signals.clueEvent: Dark webs pulse with offers for high-risk token data.

signals.npcLine: Fearing the fade—keep your cred close and eyes closer.
signals.questPulse: Street hustlers whisper of fear infecting the neon waves.
signals.worldFeed: Rumors swirl: market shadows prey on the weak nodes.
signals.clueEvent: Scattered bets placed on tokens losing their glow.
